hooks.name: session-resume
hooks.description: On every new session, read state/pipeline_state.json and inject current phase, completed artifacts, and next step into the agent context.

hooks.name: phase-order-gate
hooks.description: Hard gate: exits 2 (blocking) if the requested phase skill is invoked out of sequence. Agent cannot jump from Phase 1 to Phase 5.

hooks.name: refs-read-gate
hooks.description: Hard gate: exits 2 (blocking) if ../../references/client-context.md has not been read in this session. No file writes until context is loaded.

hooks.name: advance-state
hooks.description: After any phase skill completes successfully, advance the phase counter in state.json and record the artifact path.

hooks.name: status-line
hooks.description: At the end of every turn, emit a status line: [de-pipeline] Phase: X/7 | Artifacts: Y | Next: Z
